metadata.summary: Continuous governance, no recess, daily/weekly/monthly sessions

definition.core_principle: Parliament operates continuously without recess, mirroring continuous autonomous operations. Parliamentary work never pauses; democratic governance is perpetual obligation
definition.continuity: Parliament always 'in session' even if not actively debating. Proposals 24/7 via scratchpad.json, IAS operates continuously, Shadow Cabinet audits ongoing, Chief Justice available

powers.convening: PM or Chief Justice call special sessions, emergency auto-convene on crisis, regular follow roadmap.json schedule
powers.quorum: All branches represented (minimum 1 per branch), votes invalid without quorum, abstentions counted
powers.management: IAS Cabinet Secretary schedules, publishes agendas in activeContext.json, records minutes, archives in memory.json, ensures continuity across interruptions

daily_sessions: 1. Morning: Read scratchpad, review top 5 priorities, IAS overnight updates, quick consensus (≤15 min), assign scratchpad[0]
2. Monitor: IAS tracks activeContext, Shadow audits real-time, Chief Justice monitors compliance, no formal session (parallel)
3. Evening: Read progress, review completed, escalate issues, confirm next day, calc RL scores
weekly_sessions: 1. Progress: Weekly metrics, IAS presents roadmap progress, Shadow audit findings, identify bottlenecks
2. Adjust: Review roadmap alignment, adjust priorities, approve initiatives (≥95%), resource reallocation
3. Learning: Analyze mistakes patterns in memory.json, systemPatterns effectiveness, constitutional compliance trending, approve improvements
monthly_sessions: 1. Strategic: Long-term roadmap review, milestone assessment, budget planning (Finance Officer), technology stack
2. Constitutional: Amendment proposals, compliance audit, precedent review in memory.json, governance effectiveness
3. Cross-Project: Knowledge graph review, pattern sharing workspaces, best practices, industry trends (IAS Researcher)
continuity_protocol: 1. Detect: IDE restart/timeout/network failure, activeContext marks interruption
2. Recover: Read session state, Parliament auto-reconvenes, no re-vote, resume from point
3. Integrity: Decisions permanent in progress.json, timestamps, transcripts in activeContext, memory.json intact

violations.remediation: 30 consecutive sessions without absence, demonstrate parliamentary commitment, Cabinet Secretary audit, Chief Justice approval
